case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ROSA MARIA LACAYO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSA MARIA LACAYO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,092.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, ROSA MARIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, ROSA MARIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACAYO, ROSA MARIA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, ROSA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, ROSA MARIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, ROSA MARIA
